rulings.Case Title: DIANA PENG et al VS. RICHARD PATRICK GORDON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Enter Into Settlement Of Pending Action (Ccp Sect 708.440)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 01, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFFS DIANA PENG, ALAN LEDESMA AND RAY ABASOLO'S Notice Motion For Order To Enter Into Settlement Of Pending Action (Ccp Sect 708.440) continued to December 17, 2015. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than December 4, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TONY K FONG VS. HUANZHI JIANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Admission, Special Interrogatories And Form Interrogatories And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 01, 2015, line 5. PLAINTIFF TONY FONG'S Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Admission, Special Interrogatories And Form Interrogatories And For Sanctions GRANTED, no opposition filed. Defendant shall provide verified responses without objections to Special and Form Interrogatories within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,600. = (501/REQ)
